{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alazar's staff
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Alazar's staff]] is a ten-foot sliver of [[dragon]]�s bone with crystallized enhancement gems and a sharpened edge used as a spear.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
